reference: Hello there, Doctor. I was in a car accident about four years ago and suffered a C6 burst fracture, but I did not need surgery. Now, because it was crushed by about fifty%, do you think it would be healed by now? I am still experiencing tightness as well. Do I still need to stay away from extreme sports?
text: Hello there, doctor. I was in a car accident about 4 years ago and suffered a C6 burst fracture, but I did not need surgery. Now, because it was crushed by about 50%, do you think it would be healed by now? I am still experiencing tightness as well; do I still need to stay away from extreme sports?
